name: Russian Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat and onion in butter or margarine (or use cooking spray). Drain excess oil. Remove from heat.
2. Add all ingredients except for half of the cheese, the bread dough, and mix thoroughly.
- If desired, freeze the mixture in a 4-cup container.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Unroll the bread dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Shape the filling into a loaf on top of the dough. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
6. Cover the meat and seal the edges.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes.
